ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Polling is an additional mechanism to detect file changes.
ast.target: 轮询是检测文件变更的附加机制。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The lower the value, the more CPU-intensive the plugin will be.
ast.target: 值越低，插件占用的CPU资源越多。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The higher the value, the more delay might occur to detect the missed file changes.
ast.target: 值越高，检测遗漏文件变更的延迟可能越大。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 使用0可禁用轮询。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The timeout to distinguish deletion and rename events.
ast.target: 用于区分删除和重命名事件的超时时间。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Rename events are often a pair of create/delete events, which do not require this timeout.
ast.target: 重命名事件通常是一对创建/删除事件，不需要此超时。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: However, in some rare cases, the events are sent in a reverse delete/create order, where this timeout will be needed to correctly detect the rename event.
ast.target: 然而，在某些罕见情况下，事件会以反向的删除/创建顺序发送，此时需要此超时来正确检测重命名事件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 设置为 0 可禁用此超时。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 似乎加载的翻译是扁平 JSON 格式而不是嵌套格式。请在初始化时设置 keySeparator: false，或确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init: 未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init: i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用 init 一次！

ast.name: warn
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next 未初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages were undefined or empty
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages 未定义或为空

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N 未初始化，正在初始化默认的 obsidian-dev-utils 翻译
